meaning: n.砍,排骨,官印,商标vt.剁碎,砍,(风浪)突变
examples: Three more schemes have got the chop.
Sometimes they have to chop down a tree for firewood.
You peel the onions and wash them, then chop them.
Haymarket's frantic, rackety Chop Chop (chop-chop.co.uk) serves some of the best dumplings I've tasted outside Hong Kong.
Our main courses were outstanding, too, including Alice's veal sweetbreads with girolles and Bruno's similarly garnished veal chop.
